text: Walked the Emerald Hall tonight for the Rodriguez Quinceañera setup. Ceiling drape is going to look incredible with the uplighting we have planned. October cannot get here fast enough.
Raiders open the season at home Sept 7. Tickets are moving fast. Full preview breakdown in today's show.
Shoutout to everyone on the housekeeping floor at the Grand Sierra this week. We covered three conferences and a sold-out weekend without missing a checkout window. That is a team.
Chris did the flowers AND the timeline coordination for my cousin's party last fall. People are still talking about it. Book him.
Made carnitas last Sunday. Took four hours. Gone in twenty minutes. Isabella asked for a to-go plate for school the next day. That is the review I needed.
Vendor spotlight: @momentosbychris brings full-service Quinceañera planning to the Las Vegas valley. From venue walk-through to day-of coordination. Link to his portfolio in our bio.
@LVEventPros Thank you for the feature. October and November are filling up fast. DMs open for 2027 inquiries.
Temperatures hit 108 in the valley today. Stay hydrated, Las Vegas. This is not a drill.
Two Quinceañeras booked for November. Working with @carmen_shoots on both. Venue scouting starts next month. This is the part I actually love.
Halloween block party at the complex is back. Pool area. Oct 31. My job: decorations and the tamale situation. Updates incoming.
